title: What winning the phone war actually looks like
caption:
You've tried willpower. How's that going?

The phone is not a discipline problem. It's a design problem. It's built to outrun your willpower every time. The game is rigged.

The men who win this battle don't fight it in the moment. They fight it hours before — building a life the phone can't compete with, making decisions before the pull gets loud.

A man of faith has war here, not a detox. Here's the difference.

#faith #discipline #phonefree #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #digitalminimalism #mensfaith
